title: rubus hirtus var. pubifolius
intro: Rubus hirtus var. pubifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of wild raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. pubifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
